'''Robbe Nostler''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] reporter who worked for the [[Galactic News Network]]. He was the Bureau Chief at the [[Indu GNN bureau]] on [[Indu San/Legends|Indu San]].<ref name="Kella Rand, Reporting..." />

When [[Kella Rand]] came in to the office to study her past vidclips, he was engrossed in a [[Hologram/Legends|holoclip]] report of an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] entertainer accompanied by music.<ref name="Kella Rand, Reporting..." />

{{Char-stub}}
